description: L.POINT is a South Korean loyalty and payments service operated by LOTTE Members, offering point accrual, redemption, payments, coupons, shopping, and related member services. The lpoint.com domain mainly hosts consumer web/app experiences and a restricted partner portal.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for lpoint.com; the site appears to be a consumer loyalty service and a login-only partner portal, with no documented public API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI on lpoint.com subdomains.
